title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
summary: OpenAI与Hugging Face合作，分享了AI模型评估期间一起安全事件的初步发现，强调了先进的网络能力及对防御者的教训。
highlights: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation
highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders
